suit.name: Bagru Print Cotton Kurta
suit.Base color: The cream / off-white base gives a natural and organic feel — a signature element of authentic Bagru prints.
Motifs: The small spiral and dotted booti patterns on the upper section create a soft, graceful texture
The bold floral and leaf motifs in the lower section add strong traditional character.
Border Detailing: The red and rust-toned border adds a royal and festive touch.
The golden zari-style pattern enhances the richness and premium look.
suit.Contrast Play: The black and cream contrast is striking, making the patterns stand out beautifully even from a distance.

suit.name: Traditional Bagru Saree
suit.Base color: The cream / off-white base gives a soft, earthy foundation that reflects the natural and organic essence of authentic Bagru printing.
Motifs: The upper section features delicate floral vine patterns that create an elegant and flowing visual texture.
The pallu and lower sections showcase bold traditional floral motifs with intricate detailing, adding richness and cultural depth.
Border Detailing: The red border introduces a vibrant festive appeal and enhances the saree’s traditional charm.
The geometric black border patterns and golden zari-style accents add structure, richness, and a refined handcrafted look.
suit.Contrast Play: The combination of cream, black, and deep red creates a striking visual contrast, allowing the motifs and borders to stand out with bold traditional elegance.

suit.name: Bagru Print Cotton Shirt
suit.Base color: The cream / off-white base provides a soft earthy backdrop that highlights the authenticity and natural character of traditional Bagru printing.
Motifs: The upper section features delicate floral vine patterns that create a graceful and flowing texture.
The lower pallu area displays large floral motifs with leafy detailing, adding boldness and traditional richness to the design.
Border Detailing: The deep red border enhances the saree with a vibrant festive appeal and traditional warmth.
The geometric black patterns combined with golden zari-style bands add structure, elegance, and a refined handcrafted finish.
suit.Contrast Play: The interplay of cream, black, and rich red creates a striking contrast, allowing the bold floral motifs and borders to stand out with strong traditional elegance.

suit.name: Bagru Print Cotton Dress
suit.Base color: The cream / off-white base provides a warm, earthy foundation that reflects the natural simplicity and authenticity of traditional Bagru printing.
Motifs: The body features vertical wavy line patterns that create a rhythmic and flowing visual movement.
The lower section highlights stylized leaf and tribal-inspired motifs, while the pallu showcases repeating booti elements that add folk charm and cultural depth.
Border Detailing: The deep red border adds a vibrant traditional warmth and festive appeal.
The geometric black patterns and golden zari-style bands provide structure, balance, and a refined handcrafted finish.
suit.Contrast Play: The combination of cream, black, and earthy red creates a bold visual contrast, allowing the tribal motifs and patterned borders to stand out with strong traditional character.

suit.name: Bagru Print Cotton Kurta
suit.Base color: The cream / off-white base provides a warm earthy canvas that enhances the authenticity and natural appeal of traditional Bagru printing.
Motifs: The body features rhythmic vertical wavy lines that create a flowing and structured visual movement.
The pallu and blouse section showcase dense floral vine motifs, adding richness, elegance, and traditional charm.
Border Detailing: The deep red border introduces a vibrant festive warmth and enhances the saree’s traditional appeal.
The bold black geometric patterns combined with golden zari-style accents add definition, balance, and a refined handcrafted finish.
suit.Contrast Play: The combination of cream, black, and rich red creates a bold and striking contrast, allowing the floral vines and tribal-inspired borders to stand out with strong traditional elegance.

suit.name: Bagru Print Cotton Kurta
suit.Base color: The cream / off-white base offers a warm, earthy backdrop that highlights the natural authenticity of traditional Bagru printing.
Motifs: The body features flowing vertical wavy lines that create a rhythmic and structured visual movement.
The pallu and blouse section display repeating floral bootis, adding charm, cultural richness, and traditional character.
Border Detailing: The deep red border adds festive warmth and enhances the saree’s ethnic appeal.
The black ornamental and geometric patterns combined with golden zari-style bands provide structure, elegance, and a refined handcrafted finish.
suit.Contrast Play: The interplay of cream, black, and rich red creates a bold traditional contrast, allowing the floral bootis and patterned borders to stand out with strong visual impact.

suits.Contrast Play: The blend of cream, black, and rich red creates a striking traditional contrast, allowing the intricate motifs and decorative borders to stand out beautifully.

suits.name: Bagru Print Cotton Kurta
suits.Base color: The cream / off-white base creates a soft, natural backdrop that reflects the earthy authenticity of traditional Bagru printing.
Motifs: The upper body features delicate spiral and dotted patterns that add subtle texture and visual softness.
The lower section showcases stylized floral and leaf motifs along with small repeating bootis, enhancing the saree’s traditional richness.
Border Detailing: The deep red border introduces festive warmth and enhances the saree’s ethnic elegance.
The bold black ornamental patterns combined with golden zari-style accents provide structure, depth, and a refined handcrafted finish.
suits.Contrast Play: The blend of cream, black, and rich red creates a striking traditional contrast, allowing the intricate motifs and decorative borders to stand out beautifully.

dupatta.name: Hand Block Printed Dupatta
dupatta.Base color: The soft cream base provides a versatile canvas that complements both casual and festive wear.
Motifs: Traditional floral jaal patterns spread across the fabric create an elegant rhythm.
Delicate booti motifs add charm and cultural richness.
Border Detailing: The intricate red and maroon border adds a vibrant festive touch.
Golden zari work on the borders enhances the premium festive appeal.
dupatta.Contrast Play: The combination of cream, red, and gold creates a stunning visual contrast, perfect for festive occasions.

dupatta.name: Chanderi Silk Dupatta
dupatta.Base color: The rich ivory base exudes elegance and sophistication, perfect for special occasions.
Motifs: Intricate floral butis scattered across the fabric create a delicate texture.
Traditional paisley motifs add a timeless appeal.
Border Detailing: The zari woven border adds a touch of royalty.
Intricate temple design patterns on the border enhance the traditional look.
dupatta.Contrast Play: The interplay of ivory and gold creates a luxurious look, making it perfect for weddings and festive events.

dupatta.name: Bandhani Tie-Dye Dupatta
dupatta.Base color: The vibrant red base captures the essence of traditional Bandhani art from Gujarat.
Motifs: Thousands of tiny dots create the classic Bandhani pattern.
Traditional diamond and square motifs add geometric charm.
Border Detailing: The contrast border enhances the vibrant look.
Mirror work details on the border add a festive sparkle.
dupatta.Contrast Play: The bold red with yellow and white dot patterns creates an energetic and festive look.

dupatta.name: Banarasi Silk Dupatta
dupatta.Base color: The deep maroon base with gold zari work creates a regal and luxurious look.
Motifs: Traditional Banarasi floral jaal covers the entire fabric.
Intricate gold brocade work adds texture and richness.
Border Detailing: The heavy gold zari border with floral patterns adds grandeur.
Traditional kadhua work on both ends enhances the regal appeal.
dupatta.Contrast Play: The deep maroon and gold combination creates a royal contrast, perfect for weddings and grand celebrations.

dupatta.name: Ajrakh Print Dupatta
dupatta.Base color: The natural indigo and red base showcases the authentic Ajrakh printing art.
Motifs: Traditional geometric patterns with star motifs create a structured design.
Intricate floral and leaf patterns add nature-inspired elements.
Border Detailing: The hand-block printed border with geometric patterns adds authenticity.
Traditional red and indigo borders complete the ethnic look.
dupatta.Contrast Play: The bold indigo, red, and white combination creates a striking traditional look.

dupatta.name: Gota Patti Dupatta
dupatta.Base color: The soft pink base with gota patti work creates a dreamy festive look.
Motifs: Gota patti lace work creates a flowing design across the fabric.
Floral motifs with gota work add texture and shine.
Border Detailing: Heavy gota patti border with leaf patterns adds a rich look.
Zari and gota combination on borders enhances the festive appeal.
dupatta.Contrast Play: The soft pink with gold gota work creates a delicate and feminine contrast.

saree.name: Banarasi Silk Saree
saree.Base color: The rich maroon base with golden zari work creates a regal and luxurious look perfect for weddings.
Motifs: Traditional Banarasi floral jaal covers the entire saree.
Intricate gold brocade work adds texture and richness.
Delicate butis scattered across the fabric create a elegant rhythm.
Border Detailing: The heavy gold zari border with floral patterns adds grandeur.
Traditional kadhua work on both ends enhances the regal appeal.
Intricate temple design patterns on the border add a traditional touch.
saree.Contrast Play: The deep maroon and gold combination creates a royal contrast, perfect for weddings and grand celebrations.

saree.name: Kanjeevaram Silk Saree
saree.Base color: The vibrant royal blue base with contrasting gold borders is a hallmark of authentic Kanjeevaram silk.
Motifs: Traditional temple motifs and peacock designs adorn the pallu.
Geometric patterns with zari work create a rich texture.
Intricate gold checks (korvai) add a classic Kanjeevaram touch.
Border Detailing: The broad gold border with traditional temple designs adds grandeur.
Contrasting red and gold border enhances the traditional appeal.
Intricate zari work on the border creates a luxurious finish.
saree.Contrast Play: The royal blue with gold and red combination creates a stunning traditional contrast, making it perfect for festive occasions.

saree.name: Chanderi Silk Saree
saree.Base color: The soft ivory base with delicate gold work creates an elegant and sophisticated look.
Motifs: Delicate floral butis scattered across the fabric create a graceful texture.
Traditional paisley motifs on the pallu add a timeless appeal.
Subtle geometric patterns add a modern touch to the traditional design.
Border Detailing: The gold zari border with floral patterns adds a touch of royalty.
Contrasting colored border enhances the traditional appeal.
Intricate weave patterns on the border create a luxurious finish.
saree.Contrast Play: The ivory and gold combination creates a subtle yet elegant contrast, perfect for both daytime and evening events.

saree.name: Tussar Silk Saree
saree.Base color: The natural golden-brown base showcases the authentic texture of Tussar silk.
Motifs: Traditional tribal and nature-inspired motifs adorn the saree.
Intricate kalamkari-style patterns on the pallu add artistic charm.
Delicate floral and leaf patterns create a connection with nature.
Border Detailing: The deep maroon border with traditional motifs adds a festive touch.
Contrasting colored border enhances the ethnic appeal.
Hand-woven details on the border create an authentic look.
saree.Contrast Play: The natural golden-brown with maroon and gold creates a warm and earthy contrast, perfect for cultural events.

saree.name: Patola Silk Saree
saree.Base color: The vibrant red base with intricate Patola patterns creates a stunning traditional look.
Motifs: Traditional Patola geometric patterns cover the entire saree.
Intricate diamond and elephant motifs add cultural richness.
Repeating patterns in contrasting colors create a rhythmic design.
Border Detailing: The distinctive Patola-style border with geometric patterns adds authenticity.
Contrasting colored borders enhance the vibrant look.
Intricate zari work on the border adds a touch of luxury.
saree.Contrast Play: The bold red with yellow, green, and white patterns creates an energetic and festive contrast, perfect for celebrations.
